name: Thornveil Crew
specialty: Specializing in stealth and ambush, Thornveil Crew is notorious for their ability to infiltrate even the most secure locations under the Dome.

members.name: Eira Ironfoot
members.note: Her face bears a permanent grimace from years of grit and toil, but her eyes remain sharp as a hawk's.

members.name: Kaelen Nightshade
members.note: His eyes glow like twilight, and his senses are said to be unmatched in the Undercity.

members.name: Rhyas Stonefist
members.note: His massive physique and intimidating presence often precede him, striking fear into the hearts of those who cross paths with him.

members.name: Vexil Thornwhisper
members.note: A charming charlatan with a silver tongue, he weaves his way through the Undercity's politics with ease.

visual: The Thornveil Crew can be spotted in the shadows, cloaked in black and hooded, their faces hidden by masks adorned with thorn vines. They carry themselves with a quiet determination, always ready for the next job.
reputation_note: They are not to be underestimated — the Thornveil Crew has a knack for turning the odds in their favor, no matter the cost.
history: [2026-03-14] Completed a major-tier contract. Rank: Unknown (+2/5)
